final_prompt.prompt:
Create a banner news/hot-topic feature image for Weibo in professional documentary photography style.

Style/medium: needs a "新闻纪实感" documentary aesthetic with "手机现场拍摄的高级照片" feel — references in the spirit of 1990s Hong Kong street photography tradition, Magnum Photos candid urban documentation, contemporary smartphone street photography (e.g., iPhone Photography Award winners); exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be wide horizontal banner with 16:9 ratio, ample negative space for text overlay
Subject: must include city skyline at dusk, neon lights gradually illuminating, pedestrians in motion blur, distant skyscrapers reflecting sunset glow
Scene/backdrop: must be an urban dusk cityscape with dramatic light contrast and strong on-site authenticity
Lighting/mood: needs a dusk twilight atmosphere with dramatic light-shadow contrast — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a dusk-to-night transition direction with warm sunset tones and cool neon accents — exact hex values are yours
Materials/textures: needs an 8K sharp detail texture treatment — exact grain and sharpness level is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "城市里的安静时刻" (large, prominent, bold or modern sans-serif), "黄昏，总能治愈一天的匆忙" (secondary), "@龙爪槐守望者real · 生活观察" (watermark, bottom or bottom-right)
Constraints: must preserve 16:9 aspect ratio, horizontal layout with text-friendly negative space, professional premium feel like real viral Weibo feature images
Avoid: must avoid over-processed or obviously AI-generated looks, must avoid cluttered composition that crowds text areas
